schema.name: BitSightCompanyDetails_CL
schema.description: The BitSightCompanyDetails table contains full company snapshots from the BitSight API per company GUID ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: Guid
columns.description: Unique identifier (GUID) for the company in BitSight.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Name of the company.

columns.name: Shortname
columns.description: Short name of the company.

columns.name: CompanyType
columns.description: The type of entity (e.g., CURATED,PRIVATE).

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Description of the company.

columns.name: PrimaryDomain
columns.description: Primary internet domain of the company.

columns.name: Homepage
columns.description: URL of the company homepage.

columns.name: DisplayUrl
columns.description: URL to the company overview page in BitSight portal.

columns.name: Sparkline
columns.description: URL to the company rating sparkline image.

columns.name: Industry
columns.description: Industry sector name.

columns.name: IndustrySlug
columns.description: URL-friendly identifier for the industry.

columns.name: SubIndustry
columns.description: Sub-industry name.

columns.name: SubIndustrySlug
columns.description: URL-friendly identifier for the sub-industry.

columns.name: Ipv4Count
columns.description: Number of IPv4 addresses attributed to the company.

columns.name: PeopleCount
columns.description: Number of people associated with the company.

columns.name: SearchCount
columns.description: Number of searches for the company.

columns.name: CustomerMonitoringCount
columns.description: Number of customers monitoring this company.

columns.name: CurrentRating
columns.description: Current overall BitSight security rating.

columns.name: RatingIndustryMedian
columns.description: Comparison of company rating to industry median (e.g., above, below).

columns.name: Ratings
columns.description: Array of historical rating snapshots, each with rating_date, rating, range, and rating_color.

columns.name: SubscriptionType
columns.description: Type of BitSight subscription (e.g., Continuous Monitoring).

columns.name: SubscriptionTypeKey
columns.description: Machine-readable subscription type key.

columns.name: SubscriptionEndDate
columns.description: Date the subscription ends (YYYY-MM-DD), or null.

columns.name: BulkEmailSenderStatus
columns.description: Bulk email sender classification (e.g., NONE).

columns.name: SecurityGrade
columns.description: Security grade, if available.

columns.name: ServiceProvider
columns.description: Indicates whether this company is a service provider.

columns.name: HasCompanyTree
columns.description: Indicates whether the company has a company tree.

columns.name: HasPreferredContact
columns.description: Indicates whether the company has a preferred contact.

columns.name: IsBundle
columns.description: Indicates whether this is a bundle entry.

columns.name: IsPrimary
columns.description: Indicates whether this is the primary company record.

columns.name: InSpmPortfolio
columns.description: Indicates whether the company is in the SPM portfolio.

columns.name: IsMycompMysubsBundle
columns.description: Indicates whether this is a my-company/my-subsidiaries bundle.

columns.name: IsCsp
columns.description: Indicates whether the company is a cloud service provider.

columns.name: HasDelegatedSecurityControls
columns.description: Indicates whether security controls have been delegated.

columns.name: CustomId
columns.description: Customer-assigned identifier for the company.

columns.name: AvailableUpgradeTypes
columns.description: Array of available upgrade types for this company.

columns.name: CompanyFeatures
columns.description: Array of feature flags enabled for the company.

columns.name: RelatedCompanies
columns.description: Array of related company references.

columns.name: PrimaryCompany
columns.description: Primary company object (guid, name), or null.

columns.name: ComplianceClaim
columns.description: Compliance claim object, or null.

columns.name: Permissions
columns.description: Object of permission flags for this company (can_annotate, can_view_forensics, etc.).

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
